change_summary: Frozen holdout evaluation of 100-seed dev-selected Acrobot scalar-search config.
failure_analysis: Expanded non-holdout dev range 0..99 selected this config after 20-seed dev search overfit and failed on holdout.
next_hypothesis: If this remains outside PPO ±5%, Acrobot needs stronger structural planning or the goal is not yet met.

change_summary: Rejected Acrobot one-step model-predictive diagnostic using local Gymnasium dynamics.
failure_analysis: Best quick lookahead diagnostic reached only about -104 mean on 20 dev seeds, below the structural/scalar dev result and far from the PPO comparator.
next_hypothesis: A useful Acrobot structural improvement likely needs a better phase/recovery controller or longer-horizon planning with stronger objective shaping.

change_summary: Extended non-holdout dev evaluation of current structural Acrobot recovery policy on seeds 0..99.
failure_analysis: No failure observed yet; this larger dev range checks whether the earlier 20-seed structural improvement was overoptimistic.
next_hypothesis: Use this broader dev result to decide whether to tune structural recovery parameters or replace the controller.

change_summary: Evaluate explicit Acrobot decision-tree policy on non-holdout validation seeds 200..299 after PPO distillation.
failure_analysis: No failure observed yet; this checks the persisted JSON tree reproduces the distillation validation result.
next_hypothesis: If validation reproduces the PPO-level result, evaluate the frozen tree once on holdout.

change_summary: Frozen holdout evaluation of explicit Acrobot decision-tree policy distilled from PPO on non-holdout seeds.
failure_analysis: Non-holdout validation reproduced PPO-level performance; holdout tests whether the frozen transparent tree closes the Acrobot deep-RL gap.
next_hypothesis: If the tree is within ±5% of PPO, update the report conclusion; otherwise the distilled tree overfit non-holdout teacher traces.

change_summary: Distill Acrobot PPO teacher into a 223-node explicit decision-tree policy using non-holdout seeds.
failure_analysis: No failure observed on non-holdout validation; this adds teacher-training and distillation cost accounting for the tree policy.
next_hypothesis: Evaluate the frozen tree policy through the normal harness on fixed holdout seeds.

change_summary: Train PPO deep-RL baseline for 200000 timesteps on LunarLander-v3 and evaluate on fixed holdout seeds.
next_hypothesis: Use this PPO result as the deep-RL comparator for ±5% heuristic comparison.

change_summary: Train PPO deep-RL baseline for 300000 timesteps on LunarLander-v3 and evaluate on fixed holdout seeds.
next_hypothesis: Use this PPO result as the deep-RL comparator for ±5% heuristic comparison.

change_summary: Train DQN deep-RL baseline for 300000 timesteps on LunarLander-v3 and evaluate on fixed holdout seeds.
next_hypothesis: Use this DQN result as the deep-RL comparator for ±5% heuristic comparison.

change_summary: Promote tuned Gymnasium-style BipedalWalker state-machine controller after dev-only search showed target-level walking.
failure_analysis: Previous sine gait stayed upright but made little forward progress; dev diagnostics showed a state-machine gait with explicit support/swing/push-off phases solves the missing locomotion class.
next_hypothesis: If the dev result reproduces the search result, freeze the controller and evaluate once on holdout without further Bipedal tuning.

change_summary: Frozen holdout evaluation of dev-selected BipedalWalker state-machine controller; no holdout tuning applied.
failure_analysis: No holdout evidence had been used for the state-machine tuning; this run tests whether dev target-level walking transfers to the fixed holdout seeds.
next_hypothesis: Use benchmark solved-score cutoffs as the primary success criterion and keep DQN/PPO entries as optional comparators rather than required thresholds.

change_summary: Bounded dev-only parameter search over the BipedalWalker state-machine controller; selected speed=0.26/action_scale=0.60/vertical_damping=15/hull_angvel_gain=1.8.
failure_analysis: Search improved BipedalWalker dramatically, but the scratch diagnostic did not record aggregate environment steps, so this ledger row is marked partial and the selected controller is re-evaluated through the normal harness in adjacent rows.
next_hypothesis: Use the selected constants only if the normal harness reproduces the dev result, then run a single frozen holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Promote transparent finite-horizon MountainCar dynamics planner after verifying installed Gymnasium threshold is -110.
failure_analysis: The prior energy-pumping heuristic averaged -117.42 on holdout, missing the installed benchmark threshold; a model-based planner handles the early reversal timing that the sign heuristic cannot.
next_hypothesis: If the planner reproduces threshold-level dev performance, freeze it and run one holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Frozen holdout evaluation of the dev-validated MountainCar finite-horizon dynamics planner; no holdout tuning applied.
failure_analysis: No holdout evidence was used to select the planner; this run checks whether benchmark-threshold performance transfers to fixed holdout seeds.
next_hypothesis: Keep benchmark reward thresholds as the primary cutoff; remaining miss, if any, should be addressed without neural/RL reruns.

change_summary: Validate top dev-prescreen BipedalWalker state-machine constants on the full development seed range.
failure_analysis: Installed Gymnasium reward threshold is 300; previous state-machine defaults averaged 280.32 on dev and 277.25 on holdout, below the benchmark cutoff, so only development seeds were used to select faster constants.
next_hypothesis: If full dev remains at or above the benchmark target, promote these constants into the default improved policy before one frozen holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Validate second dev-prescreen BipedalWalker constants on the full development seed range after the fastest config overfit five seeds.
failure_analysis: The 0.30/0.55 config scored above threshold on five dev seeds but failed on the full dev range; this tests a slower candidate selected from the same dev-only prescreen.
next_hypothesis: Promote only if full dev reaches the benchmark target or at least the 5% cutoff with acceptable variance.

change_summary: Validate third dev-prescreen BipedalWalker constants on the full development seed range.
failure_analysis: The 0.28/0.55 candidate came within 0.5 points of the 5% benchmark cutoff but had one fall; this tests a slightly stronger action scale from the dev-only prescreen.
next_hypothesis: Promote only if full dev reaches the benchmark target or at least the 5% cutoff with acceptable variance.

change_summary: Validate intermediate BipedalWalker speed/action constants on the full development seed range.
failure_analysis: The 0.28/0.55 candidate nearly cleared the 5% benchmark cutoff but fell on one dev seed; this tests a slightly slower setting selected from development-only diagnostics.
next_hypothesis: Promote only if full dev reaches the benchmark target or at least the 5% cutoff with acceptable variance.

change_summary: Validate refined BipedalWalker speed/action constants near the stable full-dev candidate.
failure_analysis: The 0.27/0.55 candidate cleared the 5% benchmark cutoff on dev without falls but remained below the strict target; this checks whether a small speed increase preserves stability.
next_hypothesis: Promote the better stable full-dev candidate before one frozen holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Validate another refined BipedalWalker speed near the full-dev stability boundary.
failure_analysis: The 0.275/0.55 candidate cleared the 5% cutoff but stayed below the strict 300 target; this checks a small additional speed increase on development seeds only.
next_hypothesis: Promote the best stable full-dev candidate before one frozen holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Validate BipedalWalker speed just below the unstable 0.28 setting on the full development seed range.
failure_analysis: The 0.2775/0.55 candidate was stable but below strict target; 0.28/0.55 had one full-dev fall, so this tests the boundary without using holdout.
next_hypothesis: Promote the best stable full-dev candidate before one frozen holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Validate BipedalWalker speed at the final dev-only stability boundary before promotion.
failure_analysis: 0.279/0.55 was stable and near the strict target; this final boundary check tries to improve score without crossing into the known unstable 0.28 setting.
next_hypothesis: Promote the best stable full-dev candidate before one frozen holdout evaluation.

change_summary: Promote stable dev-selected BipedalWalker speed/action constants into the default state-machine controller.
